scrapedName: Ethnic Encounters: 9 Days with Hill Tribes in Northwest & Northeast Vietnam

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Discover Duong Lam Ancient Village - Nghia Lo
itinerary.description:
Morning

Start your day as your personal driver awaits to pick you up from Hanoi Old Quarter. The first destination is Duong Lam Ancient Village, a designated National Cultural Monument renowned for its distinctive old-aged houses, historical temples, and rich Confucian cultural heritage. At lunchtime, we pause at a local residence to relish a delightful meal then indulge in a brief rejuvenating nap if needed. Afternoon

Embark on a journey to Nghia Lo, located in Yen Bai province, celebrated for its breathtaking rice terraces and mountainous panoramas. This region is a melting pot of diverse ...

itinerary.title: Nghia Lo - Trek through Mu Cang Chai’s iconic terraced rice fields
itinerary.description:
Morning/Afternoon

Start your day by awakening to the crisp, refreshing air and the serene ambiance of the countryside. Recharge your energy with a delectable breakfast. Once the check-out formalities are completed, set your course for Mu Cang Chai, a renowned destination celebrated for its awe-inspiring landscapes and authentic rural allure. This locale is where various ethnic communities live. Therefore this place contains not one but many one-of-the-kind ethnic traditions

itinerary.title: Mu Cang Chai - Sapa - Scenic Drives and Mountain Views
itinerary.description:
Morning

Commence your day with a delightful breakfast to invigorate yourself for the adventures that lie ahead. Your private car will pick you up, transporting you from Mu Cang Chai, passing through Tan Uyen (Lai Chau District), and onward to Sapa. Along the journey, relish the breathtaking views of the rural countryside, where majestic mountains and serene rice fields unfold before your eyes. Upon reaching Sapa, indulge in a scrumptious lunch before making your way to the hotel for a well-deserved period of relaxation. Afternoon

The afternoon grants you the freedom to explore the enchanting...

itinerary.title: Sapa - Explore Bac Ha Market - Hoang Su Phi
itinerary.description:
Morning

Arrive at the lively Bac Ha Market, renowned as one of the most prominent ethnic markets in Northern Vietnam. Immerse yourself in the dynamic trading culture that unfolds among various minority groups, where the market comes alive with a kaleidoscope of colors as people don traditional costumes. Embark on an exploration of the market, immersing yourself in its authentic and primal characteristics. Discover unique souvenirs and gifts, such as intricately hand-embroidered textiles, or indulge in local snacks and delicacies like grilled meat skewers or sticky rice cakes. Following the ex...

itinerary.title: Hoang Su Phi - Drive through Tan Su Phin and Cong Troi Pass - Ha Giang
itinerary.description:
Morning/ Afternoon:

For today, be ready because the two most impressive passes in the Northern area of Vietnam are on the visiting list for us to explore. They are the famous Tan Su Phin Pass and Cong Troi Pass. This private journey leads us through captivating scenes of majestic nature. Don’t miss out the opportunity to capture the moment off yourself drowned into scenery. After that, head to Ha Giang and enjoy lunch at a local restaurant on the way

itinerary.title: Ha Giang - Dong Van Karst Plateau Geopark - Trekking in Ma Pi Leng Pass
itinerary.description:
Morning

Commence our day with a picturesque drive traversing Cong Troi Pass and Yen Minh en route to Dong Van. Begin by visiting the King's Palace in Sa Phin Village, a 20th-century architectural marvel belonging to the leader of the H'Mong ethnic community. Hear captivating stories about the family's life and witness the distinctive architectural style. Sightsee the Karst Plateau Geopark in Dong Van, an enthralling region boasting extensive limestone areas, breathtaking mountain vistas, and the cultural richness of various ethnic minorities. We take a break and pause for lunch at one of the ...

itinerary.title: Meo Vac Market - Bao Lac - Stay overnight in Pac Rang
itinerary.description:
Morning

Today, we pay a visit to a quaint town inhabited by various ethnic groups such as Tay, Dao, H'mong, and Lo Lo which is named Meo Vac. If our tour happens to coincide on a Sunday morning, seize the opportunity to immerse yourself in the local market scene. Witness local artisans selling handmade clothes and crafting indigo-dyed jackets using vintage sewing machines, all adorned in vibrant ethnic attire. Lunch will be served at a restaurant in Bao Lac. Afternoon

Journey to Pac Rang to engage with the Nung ethnic community and gain insights into their craftsmanship of farm tools and bla...

itinerary.title: Ba Be - Marvel at Ban Gioc Waterfall and Tiger Cave
itinerary.description:
Morning/Afternoon

Begin your day with a hearty breakfast before setting out on a hill tribe's adventure to Cao Bang. Our touring attraction today is Ban Gioc Waterfall, a breathtaking gem nestled in the Northern mountainous region. Take a leisurely stroll, soak in the sights, and capture the stunning beauty of the waterfall in photographs. If your visit coincides with the period between September to December, you're in for the best opportunity to witness the waterfall's majestic splendor. Proceed to Nguom Ngao, aptly named "Tiger Cave," a remarkable sight featuring awe-inspiring rock formatio...

itinerary.title: Ba Be Lake Boat Tour - Back to Hanoi
itinerary.description: Revitalize yourself with a delectable breakfast. Embark on a trek through the mesmerizing rice fields, guiding your way to the Bo Lu boat station. Upon arrival, embark on a 3-hour boat tour, cruising the crystal-clear waters of Ba Be Lake. Absorb the awe-inspiring scenery, relish the refreshing breeze, and take a dip in the invigorating waters for a swim. Indulge in a satisfying lunch at a local house

highlights: Embark on our journey to explore and experience the unique culture of the ethnic minorities in the deep, remote mountainous areas of northern Vietnam.
Travel around open landscapes, and breathe the fresh air in a tranquil rural atmosphere, from terrace fields to extraordinary waterfalls.
Learn about the daily life of the traditional minor ethnic community of the upland.
included: Accommodation in TWN/ DBL sharing accommodation at hotel, except overnight on train and homestay (if any)
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
Entrance fees for Vietnam attractions, as per itinerary
Meals as indicated in the program
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
